title: Bumble Inc. (BMBL) Q4 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
text: Wall Street analysts predict Bumble will report quarterly earnings of $0.12 per share, down 29.4% year-over-year. Revenue is forecasted at $275.38 million, representing 14% growth compared to the prior year. Analysts project several important operational metrics: Total Paying Users expected to reach 3.89 million (up from 3.41 million). Bumble App users forecast at 2.68 million (versus 2.22 million previously). Badoo App users estimated at 1.21 million (compared to 1.19 million). Revenue Breakdown: Bumble App revenue projected at $225.09 million, reflecting a change of +18% from the year-ago quarter. Badoo and other revenue estimated at $52 million, showing modest 2.4% growth. Average Revenue Per User: Total ARPU $23.09 (essentially flat versus $23.01 year-ago). Bumble App ARPU $28.10 (down from $28.64). Badoo ARPU $12.43 (versus $12.48). Stock Performance Outlook: Bumble shares declined 7.7% over the past month, underperforming the S&P 500's 4.7% gain. The company holds a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell) rating.
